description.ja: 幕末から大正時代までの主要な政治・文化イベントを year 単位で整理した年表
description.en: A year-based timeline of major political and cultural events from the late Edo period through the Taisho era.

description.en: A fictional world's history organized into three lanes for dynasties, incidents, and people.
